# Stratos Consulting Crew LLC

## What We Do
Analytics consulting for distributors, manufacturers, and wholesalers. We turn operational data into decisions that cut costs, free up inventory cash, and improve margins.

## Who We Serve
Distributors, manufacturers, industrial suppliers, and wholesalers in the $5-50M range, nationwide.

## Services
- Executive Dashboards and KPI Reporting (Power BI, automated weekly reports)
- Demand and Sales Forecasting (by product line, customer, season)
- Inventory Optimization (safety stock, reorder points, excess and slow-mover analysis)
- Customer and Product Profitability (cost-to-serve analysis, margin optimization)
- Reporting and Process Automation (data pipelines, scheduled reporting)
- Ongoing Analytics Partnership (month-to-month fractional analytics team)

## Site Structure
- / (home, booking a free discovery call)
- /services (service details, who we help, ERP familiarity)
- /solutions (six supplier problems we solve, with sample dashboards)
- /process (five-phase engagement process)
- /pricing (transparent fixed-scope pricing)
- /about (founder and firm values)
- /contact (book a free discovery call, contact form)
- /privacy (privacy policy)
- /terms (terms of use)

## Location
United States (remote-friendly, nationwide)

## Contact
Email: hparker6@stratosconsultingcrew.com
Website: https://www.stratosconsultingcrew.com

## Founder
Houston Parker, BS Data Science. Data scientist specializing in supply-chain analytics, Power BI, SQL, and Python.

## Pricing
- Discovery Assessment: $299-$499
- Dashboard Package: $1k-$2.5k
- Forecasting Project: $2.5k-$5k
- Monthly Retainer: $500-$1.5k/mo
